hero.question: Spurs vs. Warriors
hero.prob_take: The market has basically called this one, pricing Warriors at 86.5% to win, which means bettors see Golden State as a near-lock. Warriors are the deeper, more experienced squad with elite closing ability, but 86.5% leaves almost no room for error on execution or injury surprises in the next 48 hours.

daily_take.headline: Warriors Priced Like Lottery Tickets Against a Hobbled Spurs Team
daily_take.deck: Spurs-Warriors sits at 86.5% despite zero movement in 24 hours, but the market's ignoring a critical detail: San Antonio's injury report is a mess heading into January. Warriors are getting 13.5-to-1 odds on a team that historically wins these matchups when healthy rosters clash. Smart money would check the latest injury updates before dismissing the underdog here, because if the Spurs are rolling with backups, that number compresses fast.
